resources.string: Dictation: records audio, transcribes, and inserts text into focused fields. Note: Android may also show its own system Accessibility Button shortcut for Ramblr in Settings > Accessibility -- that\'s a separate OS-level shortcut, not Ramblr\'s own floating mic button.
Ramblr dictation button. Double-tap to start recording.
Ramblr dictation button. Recording. Double-tap to stop and transcribe.
Ramblr dictation button. Transcribing. Double-tap and hold to cancel.
